content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 6, 2006

Bob Macfarlane
Inter-Mountain Fair of Shasta County
P.O. Box 10
McArthur, CA 96056

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-057

Dear Mr. Macfarlane:

This letter is in response to your request on behalf of the Shasta County Inter-Mountain Fair Board.

Regulation 18329.5(a)(3)(B) provides that in cases where the Commission is not acting as the code reviewing body for the agency, the Commission will not render formal written advice or informal assistance regarding the interpretation of an agency’s conflict of interest code or the application of that code to a specific individual unless the requesting agency has first requested a determination from the code reviewing body.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division
